languages.text: Измученные, израненные, но не сломленные даже столкновением с безликими ужасами катакомб, мы все еще были полны решимости отомстить Тразину за все оскорбления, нанесенные династии фон Валанциус.
languages.translation_comment:
Если убежали от каноптековых призраков
Травмы у всех, включая РТ, свиту и Себериана

Если убежали от каноптековых призраков
Травмы у всех, включая РТ, свиту и Себериана

languages.text: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Измученные, израненные, но не сломленные даже столкновением с безликими ужасами катакомб, мы все еще были полны решимости отомстить Тразину за все оскорбления, нанесенные династии фон Валанциус.

traits.locale_text: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

languages.text: 我们精疲力竭、伤痕累累，但即便遭遇了地下墓穴中那些无面梦魇，也未被击垮。我们依然决心向特拉金复仇，清算他对冯·瓦兰修斯家族犯下的每一桩恶行。
languages.original_text: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: 我们精疲力竭、伤痕累累，但即便遭遇了地下墓穴中那些无面梦魇，也未被击垮。我们依然决心向特拉金复仇，清算他对冯·瓦兰修斯家族犯下的每一桩恶行。

languages.text: Estábamos agotados tras el encuentro con los horrores de las catacumbas, pero a pesar de todo seguíamos en pie. Estábamos decididos a vengarnos de Trazyn por todas sus afrentas contra la casa von Valancius.
languages.original_text: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Estábamos agotados tras el encuentro con los horrores de las catacumbas, pero a pesar de todo seguíamos en pie. Estábamos decididos a vengarnos de Trazyn por todas sus afrentas contra la casa von Valancius.

languages.text: Nous étions épuisés et en piteux état, mais loin d'être brisés par notre affrontement contre les horreurs sans visage des catacombes. Nous étions toujours décidés à nous venger de Trazyn pour chacun des outrages commis à l'encontre de la maison von Valancius.
languages.original_text: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Nous étions épuisés et en piteux état, mais loin d'être brisés par notre affrontement contre les horreurs sans visage des catacombes. Nous étions toujours décidés à nous venger de Trazyn pour chacun des outrages commis à l'encontre de la maison von Valancius.

languages.text: Yorgun ve yaralıydık ama yeraltı mezarlarının yüzsüz dehşetleriyle karşılaşmamız bile bizi kırmamıştı. Trazyn'den, von Valancius Hanesi'ne yapılan her hakaretin intikamını almaya kararlıydık.
languages.original_text: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Yorgun ve yaralıydık ama yeraltı mezarlarının yüzsüz dehşetleriyle karşılaşmamız bile bizi kırmamıştı. Trazyn'den, von Valancius Hanesi'ne yapılan her hakaretin intikamını almaya kararlıydık.

languages.text: Wir waren erschöpft und verwundet, aber selbst nach unserer Begegnung mit den gesichtslosen Schrecken der Katakomben nicht gebrochen. Wir waren weiterhin entschlossen, Trazyn für jedes Verbrechen an Haus von Valancius zur Rechenschaft zu ziehen.
languages.original_text: We were exhausted and wounded but not broken, not even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Wir waren erschöpft und verwundet, aber selbst nach unserer Begegnung mit den gesichtslosen Schrecken der Katakomben nicht gebrochen. Wir waren weiterhin entschlossen, Trazyn für jedes Verbrechen an Haus von Valancius zur Rechenschaft zu ziehen.

languages.text: 私たちは疲れ果て、傷ついていたが、カタコンベの顔のない恐怖と遭遇したことで、折れなかった。フォン・ヴァランシウス家に対するすべての暴行に対して、トラズンに復讐することを決意していた。
languages.original_text: We were exhausted and wounded, but not broken even by our encounter with the faceless horrors of the catacombs. We remained determined to exact vengeance on Trazyn for every outrage perpetrated against House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: 私たちは疲れ果て、傷ついていたが、カタコンベの顔のない恐怖と遭遇したことで、折れなかった。フォン・ヴァランシウス家に対するすべての暴行に対して、トラズンに復讐することを決意していた。
